form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 6 lengths win at this track over 342m (19.57) beating Slipper's Solo in Other on April 7. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.75 lengths over 305m at Mt Gambier in a handy 17.80, beating Cadillac Magic. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (19.73) at this track over 342m. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Murray Bridge to win by 0.8 lengths in 22.57, beating Breaker Of Rules. Last start finished last over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight beaten 3.5 lengths (19.83) behind Bookaloo in a Special conditions race on April 8. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (19.79) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.
